patterns: Navigate to http://localhost:4200/. Enter email having the attribute id='emailId'.
Open http://localhost:4200/. Type email in the field with id='emailId'.
Go to http://localhost:4200/. Enter email into input id='emailId'.
Launch http://localhost:4200/ and fill email having id='emailId'.
Visit http://localhost:4200/. Enter email using id='emailId'.
Navigate to http://localhost:4200/. Enter email having the attribute id='emailId'. Click login.
Open http://localhost:4200/. Type email in the field with id='emailId'. Click login.
Go to http://localhost:4200/. Enter email into input id='emailId'. Press login.
Launch http://localhost:4200/, fill email having id='emailId', and click the login button.
Visit http://localhost:4200/. Enter email using id='emailId'. Submit the login form.
Navigate to http://localhost:4200/. Enter email having the attribute id='emailId' value 'madhu.unni@gmail.com' and password having the attribute id='pwd' value 'test123' . Click login.
Open http://localhost:4200/. Enter email id='emailId' value 'madhu.unni@gmail.com' and password id='pwd' value 'test123'. Click login.
Go to http://localhost:4200/. Type 'madhu.unni@gmail.com' into email field id='emailId' and type 'test123' into password field id='pwd'. Press login.
Launch http://localhost:4200/, fill email id='emailId' with 'madhu.unni@gmail.com', fill password id='pwd' with 'test123', then click login.
Visit http://localhost:4200/. Enter 'madhu.unni@gmail.com' in id='emailId'. Enter 'test123' in id='pwd'. Submit login.

Navigate to http://localhost:4200/. Enter email from environment variable APP_EMAIL having the attribute id='emailId' and password from environment variable APP_PASSWORD having the attribute id='pwd'. Click login.
Open http://localhost:4200/. Type APP_EMAIL into id='emailId' and APP_PASSWORD into id='pwd'. Click login.
Go to http://localhost:4200/. Fill email id='emailId' from APP_EMAIL and password id='pwd' from APP_PASSWORD, then press login.
Launch http://localhost:4200/, enter email from APP_EMAIL using id='emailId', enter password from APP_PASSWORD using id='pwd', and submit login.

steps.description: Enter email from environment variable APP_EMAIL
Enter password from environment variable APP_PASSWORD

patterns: Navigate to https://example.com/login. Enter 'alice@example.com' in the field having id='email'.
Open http://localhost:3000/signup. Type 'John Smith' into input id='fullName'.
Go to https://qa.portal.test/profile. Fill '5551234567' in field id='phoneNumber'.
Launch https://app.test/settings and enter 'New York' using id='city'.
Navigate to https://example.com/login. Enter email id='userEmail' value 'bob@example.com' and password id='userPassword' value 'Secret@123'. Click login.
Open http://localhost:4200/. Type 'madhu.unni@gmail.com' into email field id='emailId' and type 'test123' into password field id='pwd'. Press login.
Go to https://qa.crm.test/signin. Fill username id='username' with 'qa_user' and password id='password' with 'qa-pass-9', then submit.
Launch https://accounts.test/auth. Enter 'agent007' in id='loginName'. Enter 'Bond#007' in id='loginSecret'. Click sign in.
Visit https://portal.test/session. Set id='tenantId' to 'acme-prod', id='userId' to 'u-1001', and id='pin' to '2468'. Click continue.
Navigate to https://example.com/login. Click the button with id='loginBtn'.
Open https://app.test/cart. Click checkout button id='checkoutButton'.
Go to http://localhost:8080/search. Press the Search button having id='searchNow'.
Navigate to https://example.com/login. Enter email from environment variable TEST_EMAIL having id='email'. Enter password from environment variable TEST_PASSWORD having id='password'. Click login.

steps.description: Enter email from environment variable TEST_EMAIL
Enter password from environment variable TEST_PASSWORD

Enter admin password from environment variable ADMIN_PASS
